description: Under the Constitution written by the mythical law-giver Lycurgus, the institution of The Agoge was established, where Spartans were trained from the age of 6 to be superior warriors in defense of the Spartan state.
tooltip: [font="sans-bold-14"]• Spartiate Hoplites and Phalangites +10% health and cost −1 population, but +20% increased train time.

[font="sans-bold-14"]• Champion Hoplites +10% health.
• Champion Hoplites −1 population cost.
• Champion Phalangites +10% health.
• Champion Phalangites −1 population cost.
• Does not apply to Champion Skiritai Runners.
• Unlock “Krypteia.”[/font]
